title: CraftConquest: Chronicles
body:
# CraftConquest: Chronicles A pretty goofy (and scary) modpack designed for multiplayer _(Singleplayer is fine too, I guess)_ created by [KilLo](https://killo.club/) with help from [Tuxum](https://www.youtube.com/Tuxum). ## About CraftConquest: Chronicles is a modpack aimed at being a silly and scary modpack to play with your friends, including [Essential](https://essential.gg/) for easy multiplayer, as well as [proximity voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), you and your friends will _hopefully_ have a fun time! There are 2 main versions, v1.0 and v2.0, to know which version you should play, continue reading below. ## What version do I play? [v1.0](https://modrinth.com/modpack/craftconquest/version/1.0): Looks like vanilla with a few spooky mods [v2.0+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/craftconquest/versions): True horror experience (Walmarts included)

### Still not sure what version to play? Do you: - **A:** Want to trick your friends into playing a horror pack? - **B:** Want a mostly vanilla with a few horror mods? - **C:** Want to play a full horror experience with dark lightning, more horror mods, and more? **A**: Pick your poison. **B**: v1.0 **C**: v2.0+
### Credits - [Cave Dweller Reimagined](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-reimagined) - [Eyes in the Darkness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/eyes-in-the-darkness) - [Walmart](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/walmart) - [TCT Flashlight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tct-flashlight) - [TCT Core](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tct-core) - [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue) - [Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured) - _Everybody else who made the mods on Modrinth :)_ Check out my other mods! [killo.club/mods](https://killo.club/mods)
